parameters.name: onlyConflicts
parameters.description: Whether only translations, which are in conflict with existing translations should be returned

parameters.name: onlyUnresolved
parameters.description: Whether only translations with unresolved conflictswith existing translations should be returned

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: String to search in translation text or key

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
